'''roshazaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:twelvehynde|twelvehynde]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-sh-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:twelvehynde|twelvehynde]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| roshazaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:roshazithi|roshazithi]] || [[word:roshaziji|roshaziji]] || [[word:roshazishi|roshazishi]] || [[word:roshaziki|roshaziki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:roshazuthuthu|roshazuthuthu]] || [[word:roshazujuju|roshazujuju]] || [[word:roshazushushu|roshazushushu]] || [[word:roshazukuku|roshazukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:roshazuthu|roshazuthu]] || [[word:roshazuju|roshazuju]] || [[word:roshazushu|roshazushu]] || [[word:roshazuku|roshazuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:roshazufthuf|roshazufthuf]] || [[word:roshazufjuf|roshazufjuf]] || [[word:roshazufshuf|roshazufshuf]] || [[word:roshazufkuf|roshazufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:roshazethe|roshazethe]] || [[word:roshazeje|roshazeje]] || [[word:roshazeshe|roshazeshe]] || [[word:roshazeke|roshazeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:roshazothotho|roshazothotho]] || [[word:roshazojojo|roshazojojo]] || [[word:roshazoshosho|roshazoshosho]] || [[word:roshazokoko|roshazokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:roshazotho|roshazotho]] || [[word:roshazojo|roshazojo]] || [[word:roshazosho|roshazosho]] || [[word:roshazoko|roshazoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:roshazofthof|roshazofthof]] || [[word:roshazofjof|roshazofjof]] || [[word:roshazofshof|roshazofshof]] || [[word:roshazofkof|roshazofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:roshazïfthïf|roshazïfthïf]] || [[word:roshazïfjïf|roshazïfjïf]] || [[word:roshazïfshïf|roshazïfshïf]] || [[word:roshazïfkïf|roshazïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:roshazïfthïfthïf|roshazïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:roshazïfjïfjïf|roshazïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:roshazïfshïfshïf|roshazïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:roshazïfkïfkïf|roshazïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:roshazïfthïf|roshazïfthïf]] || [[word:roshazïfjïf|roshazïfjïf]] || [[word:roshazïfshïf|roshazïfshïf]] || [[word:roshazïfkïf|roshazïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:roshazïfthïf|roshazïfthïf]] || [[word:roshazïfjïf|roshazïfjïf]] || [[word:roshazïfshïf|roshazïfshïf]] || [[word:roshazïfkïf|roshazïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:roshazæthæ|roshazæthæ]] || [[word:roshazæjæ|roshazæjæ]] || [[word:roshazæshæ|roshazæshæ]] || [[word:roshazækæ|roshazækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:roshazathatha|roshazathatha]] || [[word:roshazajaja|roshazajaja]] || [[word:roshazashasha|roshazashasha]] || [[word:roshazakaka|roshazakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:roshazatha|roshazatha]] || [[word:roshazaja|roshazaja]] || [[word:roshazasha|roshazasha]] || [[word:roshazaka|roshazaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:roshazafthaf|roshazafthaf]] || [[word:roshazafjaf|roshazafjaf]] || [[word:roshazafshaf|roshazafshaf]] || [[word:roshazafkaf|roshazafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:roshazasha|roshazasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:roshazshësha|roshazshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:roshazrosha|roshazrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:roshazmusha|roshazmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:roshazyasha|roshazyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goroshaznkshësha|goroshaznkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goroshaznkrosha|goroshaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goroshaznkmusha|goroshaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goroshaznkyasha|goroshaznkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:roshashazasha|roshashazasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:roshashazshësha|roshashazshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:roshashazrosha|roshashazrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:roshashazmusha|roshashazmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:roshashazyasha|roshashazyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goroshashaznkshësha|goroshashaznkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goroshashaznkrosha|goroshashaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goroshashaznkmusha|goroshashaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goroshashaznkyasha|goroshashaznkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:reshæzasha|reshæzasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:reshæzshësha|reshæzshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:reshæzrosha|reshæzrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:reshæzmusha|reshæzmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:reshæzyasha|reshæzyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goreshæznkshësha|goreshæznkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goreshæznkrosha|goreshæznkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goreshæznkmusha|goreshæznkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goreshæznkyasha|goreshæznkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:roshfazasha|roshfazasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:roshfazshësha|roshfazshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:roshfazrosha|roshfazrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:roshfazmusha|roshfazmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:roshfazyasha|roshfazyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goroshfaznkshësha|goroshfaznkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goroshfaznkrosha|goroshfaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goroshfaznkmusha|goroshfaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goroshfaznkyasha|goroshfaznkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c715ec1}}
